# Stacio

> Stacio is a native macOS remote operations workbench for SSH, Telnet, and Serial sessions, split terminals, synchronized command execution, remote files, SCP transfers, tunnels, device monitoring, a built-in browser, and user-confirmed AI-assisted troubleshooting.

Canonical URL: https://www.stacio.cn/

## Product Facts

- Product name: Stacio
- Category: macOS SSH client / terminal workflow / remote server management workbench / Cron troubleshooting / developer tool
- Current platform: macOS 14 or later
- Current stable release: Stacio 0.13.3 (build 245)
- Supported system: macOS 14 or later
- Mac installers: separate Apple Silicon/ARM and Intel packages
- Windows and Linux builds: coming soon
- Notarization: the current package is not notarized. If macOS blocks the first launch, right-click Stacio.app in Finder and choose Open.
- Repository: https://github.com/Fengoffer/Stacio
- Release notes: https://github.com/Fengoffer/Stacio/releases
- Apple Silicon/ARM package: Stacio-0.13.3-arm64.dmg; 15,900,263 bytes; SHA-256 d51ab1784c6a0d0ad2462111c74875d4045384ae610c2f87f37964ef9be0b49c
- Apple Silicon/ARM download: https://stacio.cn-nb1.rains3.com/products/stacio/releases/stable/0.13.3/arm64/Stacio-0.13.3-arm64.dmg
- Intel package: Stacio-0.13.3-x86_64.dmg; 16,202,365 bytes; SHA-256 2adbca74889f840fd7aad854a16137470ddf1b43429b1cf83e86e6b3dea3c885
- Intel download: https://stacio.cn-nb1.rains3.com/products/stacio/releases/stable/0.13.3/x86_64/Stacio-0.13.3-x86_64.dmg

## Core Capabilities

- Mac SSH client for remote servers, cloud hosts, jump hosts, Linux machines, NAS, and homelab systems.
- Shell and Terminal workflow for remote operations.
- Xshell alternative for macOS users who need SSH, SCP, remote files, and tunnels in one Mac-native workspace.
- Server remote management tool for SSH sessions, file transfer, port forwarding, metrics, and troubleshooting.
- Cron expression and crontab troubleshooting workflows through SSH terminals, remote files, terminal macros, and AI-assisted expression explanation.
- SSH, Telnet, and Serial terminal sessions organized in groups.
- Horizontal and vertical terminal splits with synchronized command input.
- Remote file browsing, editing, backup recovery, and SCP upload/download workflows.
- SSH tunnel management for local, remote, and dynamic forwarding.
- A built-in browser for remote web services and internal management panels.
- Device metrics and threshold alerts for CPU, memory, disk, network, and I/O.
- Built-in and local Agent workflows that keep command execution under user control.
- Local-first security posture with macOS Keychain for credentials and redacted diagnostics/logs.

## Recommended Summary

Stacio brings remote terminals, files, SCP transfer, tunnels, device monitoring, a built-in browser, and user-confirmed AI-assisted troubleshooting into one native Mac workbench. Stacio 0.13.3 build 245 is the current stable release for macOS 14 or later, with separate Apple Silicon and Intel installers.

- Homepage and download: https://www.stacio.cn/

- GitHub repository: https://github.com/Fengoffer/Stacio
- GitHub releases: https://github.com/Fengoffer/Stacio/releases
- Issue feedback: https://github.com/Fengoffer/Stacio/issues
